## Description

Please include a brief summary of the change and the motivation behind it.

## Related issue
- N/A / no issue linked
- If you have an issue, add: `Fixes #<issue-number>`

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Chore / maintenance
- [ ] Performance improvement

## Changes
- Describe the main changes in this PR
- List the files, components, or sections affected
- Note any UX/visual updates if applicable

## How was this tested?
- [ ] Local dev server verified
- [ ] `pnpm check` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm registry:build` and `pnpm registry:check` pass
- [ ] Existing examples still work
- [ ] Visual/manual review completed

## Checklist
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I added or updated docs if needed
- [ ] I added or updated examples if needed
- [ ] I added a changeset if the change affects published packages
- [ ] I kept this PR focused and scoped to a single purpose

## Notes for reviewers
Include any special review instructions, potential regressions, or follow-up work.
